required_operator_inputs: treat this as a docs-only staging slice for the bounded sample-evidence widening engine lane rather than as implementation work
write one reusable launch-anchor surface that future prompts can point at instead of restating the whole sample-evidence doctrine inline
write the bounded staged slice order explicitly while keeping later per-session kickoff prompts and contracts flexible
keep the current legacy FractalSampleResult and SampleFractalPoints surfaces authoritative in the staging packet so the future implementation cannot drift into a fake universal refactor
forbidden_operator_prompts: claim the widened evidence API or evidence struct is already implemented from this staging slice
genericize the whole fractal engine or replace the renderer contract in this staging slice
prebake a full meta-basin, operator-itinerary, or DSL implementation into the packet
leave future prompts without a checked-in owner-seam map, slice order, or first-consumer fence

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The sample-evidence widening staging contract validates successfully
The sample-evidence widening staging plan stays synchronized
The sample-evidence widening staging hostile-audit validator passes
